name: trytond-account

metadata.name: trytond-account
classifiers: Intended Audience :: Financial and Insurance Industry
License :: OSI Approved :: GNU General Public License v3 or later (GPLv3+)

documentation:
##############
Account Module
##############

The *Account Module* defines the fundamentals needed for basic double entry
accounting.
It also includes templates for the `basic universal chart of accounts
<https://www.ifrs-gaap.com/basic-universal-coa>`_, balance sheet and income
statement.

documentation: This file is part of Tryton.  The COPYRIGHT file at the top level of

methods.name: trytond.modules.account.tax.TaxCodeTemplate._get_tax_code_value
documentation: Set values for tax code creation.

methods.name: trytond.modules.account.tax.TaxCodeTemplate.create_tax_code
documentation:
Create recursively tax codes based on template.
template2tax_code is a dictionary with tax code template id as key and
tax code id as value, used to convert template id into tax code. The
dictionary is filled with new tax codes.

methods.name: trytond.modules.account.tax.TaxCode.update_tax_code
documentation:
Update recursively tax code based on template.
template2tax_code is a dictionary with tax code template id as key and
tax code id as value, used to convert template id into tax code. The
dictionary is filled with new tax codes

methods.name: trytond.modules.account.tax.TaxTemplate._get_tax_value
documentation: Set values for tax creation.

methods.name: trytond.modules.account.tax.TaxTemplate.create_tax
documentation:
Create recursively taxes based on template.

template2account is a dictionary with account template id as key and
account id as value, used to convert account template into account
code.
template2tax is a dictionary with tax template id as key and tax id as
value, used to convert template id into tax.  The dictionary is filled
with new taxes.

classes.name: trytond.modules.account.tax.Tax

methods.name: trytond.modules.account.tax.Tax.sort_taxes
documentation: Return a list of taxes sorted

methods.name: trytond.modules.account.tax.Tax.compute
documentation:
Compute taxes for price_unit and quantity at the date.
Return list of dict for each taxes and their childs with:
    base
    amount
    tax

methods.name: trytond.modules.account.tax.Tax.reverse_compute
documentation: Reverse compute the price_unit for taxes at the date.

methods.name: trytond.modules.account.tax.Tax.update_tax
documentation:
Update recursively taxes based on template.
template2account is a dictionary with account template id as key and
account id as value, used to convert account template into account
code.
template2tax is a dictionary with tax template id as key and tax id as
value, used to convert template id into tax.  The dictionary is filled
with new taxes.

Account Tax

Type:
    percentage: tax = price * rate
    fixed: tax = amount
    none: tax = none

methods.name: trytond.modules.account.tax.TaxableMixin.taxable_lines
documentation:
A list of tuples where
- the first element is the taxes applicable
- the second element is the line unit price
- the third element is the line quantity
- the forth element is the optional tax date

methods.name: trytond.modules.account.tax.TaxRuleTemplate._get_tax_rule_value
documentation: Set values for tax rule creation.

methods.name: trytond.modules.account.tax.TaxRuleTemplate.create_rule
documentation:
Create tax rule based on template.
template2rule is a dictionary with tax rule template id as key and tax
rule id as value, used to convert template id into tax rule. The
dictionary is filled with new tax rules.

methods.name: trytond.modules.account.tax.TaxRule.apply
documentation:
Apply rule on tax
pattern is a dictonary with rule line field as key and match value as
value.
Return a list of the tax id to use or None

methods.name: trytond.modules.account.tax.TaxRule.update_rule
documentation:
Update tax rule based on template.
template2rule is a dictionary with tax rule template id as key and tax
rule id as value, used to convert template id into tax rule. The
dictionary is filled with new tax rules.

methods.name: trytond.modules.account.tax.TaxRuleLineTemplate._get_tax_rule_line_value
documentation: Set values for tax rule line creation.

methods.name: trytond.modules.account.tax.TaxRuleLineTemplate.create_rule_line
documentation:
Create tax rule line based on template.
template2tax is a dictionary with tax template id as key and tax id as
value, used to convert template id into tax.
template2rule is a dictionary with tax rule template id as key and tax
rule id as value, used to convert template id into tax rule.
template2rule_line is a dictionary with tax rule line template id as
key and tax rule line id as value, used to convert template id into tax
rule line. The dictionary is filled with new tax rule lines.

methods.name: trytond.modules.account.tax.TaxRuleLine.get_taxes
documentation: Return list of taxes for a line

methods.name: trytond.modules.account.tax.TaxRuleLine.update_rule_line
documentation:
Update tax rule line based on template.
template2tax is a dictionary with tax template id as key and tax id as
value, used to convert template id into tax.
template2rule is a dictionary with tax rule template id as key and tax
rule id as value, used to convert template id into tax rule.
template2rule_line is a dictionary with tax rule line template id as
key and tax rule line id as value, used to convert template id into tax
rule line. The dictionary is filled with new tax rule lines.

or raise PeriodNotFoundError.

documentation: Create periods for the fiscal years with month interval

methods.name: trytond.modules.account.fiscalyear.FiscalYear.find

or raise FiscalYearNotFoundError.
If test_state is true, it searches on non-closed fiscal years

methods.name: trytond.modules.account.account.TypeTemplate._get_type_value
documentation: Set the values for account creation.

methods.name: trytond.modules.account.account.TypeTemplate.create_type
documentation:
Create recursively types based on template.
template2type is a dictionary with template id as key and type id as
value, used to convert template id into type. The dictionary is filled
with new types.

methods.name: trytond.modules.account.account.Type.update_type
documentation:
Update recursively types based on template.
template2type is a dictionary with template id as key and type id as
value, used to convert template id into type. The dictionary is filled
with new types

methods.name: trytond.modules.account.account.AccountTemplate._get_account_value
documentation: Set the values for account creation.

methods.name: trytond.modules.account.account.AccountTemplate.create_account
documentation:
Create recursively accounts based on template.
template2account is a dictionary with template id as key and account id
as value, used to convert template id into account. The dictionary is
filled with new accounts
template2type is a dictionary with type template id as key and type id
as value, used to convert type template id into type.

methods.name: trytond.modules.account.account.AccountTemplate.update_account2
documentation:
Update recursively account taxes and replaced_by based on template.
template2account is a dictionary with template id as key and account id
as value, used to convert template id into account.
template2tax is a dictionary with tax template id as key and tax id as
value, used to convert tax template id into tax.
template_done is a list of template id already updated. The list is
filled.

methods.name: trytond.modules.account.account.Account.get_credit_debit
documentation:
Function to compute debit, credit for accounts.
If cumulate is set in the context, it is the cumulate amount over all
previous fiscal year.

methods.name: trytond.modules.account.account.Account._cumulate
documentation:
Cumulate previous fiscalyear values into values
func is the method to compute values

methods.name: trytond.modules.account.account.Account.update_account
documentation:
Update recursively accounts based on template.
template2account is a dictionary with template id as key and account id
as value, used to convert template id into account. The dictionary is
filled with new accounts.
template2type is a dictionary with type template id as key and type id
as value, used to convert type template id into type.

methods.name: trytond.modules.account.account.Account.update_account2
documentation:
Update recursively account taxes and replaced_by base on template.
template2account is a dictionary with template id as key and account id
as value, used to convert template id into account.
template2tax is a dictionary with tax template id as key and tax id as
value, used to convert tax template id into tax.

classes.name: trytond.modules.account.account.AccountDeferral
documentation:
Account Deferral

It is used to deferral the debit/credit of account by fiscal year.

methods.name: trytond.modules.account.move.Move.validate_move
documentation: Validate balanced move

methods.name: trytond.modules.account.move.Line.default_date
documentation:
Return the date of the last line for journal, period
or the starting date of the period
or today

methods.name: trytond.modules.account.move.Line.query_get
documentation:
Return SQL clause and fiscal years for account move line
depending of the context.
table is the SQL instance of account.move.line table

methods.name: trytond.modules.account.move.Line.check_journal_period_modify
documentation:
Check if the lines can be modified or created for the journal - period
and if there is no journal - period, create it

methods.name: trytond.modules.account.move.Line.check_modify
documentation: Check if the lines can be modified

methods.name: trytond.modules.account.move.Line.reconcile
documentation:
Reconcile each list of lines together.
The writeoff keys are: date, method and description.

methods.name: trytond.modules.account.move.Line.find_best_reconciliation
documentation:
Return the list of lines to reconcile for the amount
with the smallest remaining.

For performance reason it is an approximation that searches for the
smallest remaining by removing the last line that decrease it.
